title: Pure Functions, Immutability, and Data Copies · Evaluation Trace: Purity Tests
summary: Repair a pricing pipeline where aliases mutate shared orders during validation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp purity tests increment in a pure price transformation with alias-safety tests. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test determinism, input preservation, and order independence with changed data.
Select shallow copy, deep copy, immutable representation, or ownership transfer deliberately.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
